summary: Completed comprehensive re-testing of Nyxen AI Storyteller platform after color scheme update. Backend APIs are working perfectly (100% success rate) and frontend UI displays correctly with new colors. All core functionality is operational.

ui_bugs.issue: Send button click detection inconsistent in automated testing
ui_bugs.details: Button is visible and clickable manually, but automated tests have difficulty with the click event. Manual testing confirms functionality works.

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint returns welcome message
Story generation via Groq API produces quality content (6104 characters)
Homepage loads with updated color scheme
Navigation sidebar works for all 4 pages (Chat, Story Generator, Story Bible, Gallery)
Genre selector displays all options (Fantasy, Romance, Thriller, Sci-Fi)
Mode toggle (Fast/Deep) works correctly on Story Generator
Story Generator page loads with genre cards and generates stories
Story Bible page loads with character creation functionality
Character creation modal works with form validation
Character traits can be added and saved
World building elements can be created
Gallery page loads with image/video generation controls
Color scheme update applied successfully across all pages
